---
title: "Research"
---

## Optical Computing

Add a 3-5 sentence summary of this project here. You might describe the problem setting, the main technical idea, the experimental or theoretical contribution, and the broader motivation.

## Disordered Photonics

Add a 3-5 sentence summary of this project here. You can mention the system, the practical challenge, the approach you are taking, and what makes the work important.

## Topological Photonics

Add a 3-5 sentence summary of this project here. This can introduce the computing idea, the photonic platform, and the specific scientific or engineering questions you care about.

## Open Quantum Systems

Add a 3-5 sentence summary of this project here. You might explain the role of scattering media, what computational task or physical mechanism matters most, and what direction the work is heading.
